assertions.reason: Step 1 allowed organisation name and slug entry, but no organisation type field was present even though the assertion requires name and type.
evidence: Observed fields on step 1: Organisation name, URL slug, Continue.

assertions.reason: Step 2 showed Domiciliary Care, Supported Living, and Children's Residential Homes with descriptions; selecting Children's Residential Homes advanced to step 3.
evidence: No browser console errors were observed while moving from step 2 to step 3.

assertions.reason: Step 3 supports multiple invite rows and shows a skip option, but both 'Send Invites & Finish' and 'Skip for now' end in a server-side 500 error instead of completing onboarding.
evidence: Network/console on completion attempts: POST /onboarding -> 500, browser error 'column "ip_address" of relation "audit_logs" does not exist'.

assertions.reason: Completing onboarding never redirected to an organisation dashboard; completion attempts crashed with a server error and no welcome or guided dashboard state appeared.
evidence: Observed result after submit: application error with 500 instead of dashboard redirect.

assertions.reason: The onboarding stepper updated from Step 1 of 3 to Step 2 of 3 to Step 3 of 3 as the flow advanced.
Step 1 blocked Continue without an organisation name, and Step 2 blocked Continue until at least one care domain was selected.
evidence: Step 1 messages observed: 'Organisation name is required' and 'Slug is required'; Step 2 message observed: 'Please select at least one care domain'.

assertions.reason: Registration, email verification, and sign-in worked, but the first-visit flow could not reach a personalised dashboard because onboarding completion failed and /dashboard redirected back to /onboarding.
evidence: Shared dev-server log: verification email emitted for onboard-core-20260401@example.test, POST /api/auth/register -> 201, POST /api/auth/login succeeded, POST /onboarding -> 500.

assertions.reason: Domain-adapted dashboards for two completed organisations could not be compared because onboarding completion is currently broken by POST /onboarding failing with a missing audit_logs.ip_address column.
evidence: Shared dev-server log lines show createOrganisationWithInvites failing at src/features/organisations/actions.ts:301.

blockers.description: Onboarding completion is blocked by a database/schema mismatch: createOrganisationWithInvites writes to audit_logs.ip_address, but the column does not exist.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried completion via both 'Send Invites & Finish' and 'Skip for now'; both reproduced the same POST /onboarding 500.

notes: Verification link was recovered from the shared dev-server log as instructed.
No invitation email log entries were emitted for onboard-core-invite-1@example.test or onboard-core-invite-2@example.test because organisation creation failed before completion.
